title: Data Explorer
description: The Data Explorer visualizes pre-computed Achilles characterization results for a selected data source. It provides an overview of patient counts, demographics, domain coverage, data quality metrics, and temporal trends without running new queries.
tips: Select a source from the dropdown to load its Achilles results. Use 'Run Achilles' to generate fresh results if needed.
The Overview tab shows total patients, observation years, domain record counts, and demographic distributions (gender, age pyramid).
Domain drilldown (Conditions, Drugs, etc.) shows the most prevalent concepts — useful for understanding data coverage.
The Data Quality tab displays DQD (Data Quality Dashboard) results with pass/fail checks across completeness, conformance, and plausibility dimensions.
The Heel Checks tab shows Achilles Heel rule violations — automated data integrity checks that flag potential issues.
The Temporal tab shows patient inflow/outflow over time — inspect for data truncation or upload gaps.
Results are only as fresh as the last Achilles run. Contact your admin if counts look stale.
